description_long: This is a tall, narrow shelving unit with five open shelves, each evenly spaced and capable of holding various items. The structure is rectangular and appears to be constructed from a solid, smooth material, likely metal, giving it a modern and utilitarian appearance. The sides and back are solid panels, while the front is completely open, allowing easy access to the shelves. The shelves themselves are flat and sturdy, suitable for storing books, tools, or other urban objects. The overall finish is matte gray, and there are no visible handles, doors, or decorative elements. This type of shelving unit is commonly found in garages, workshops, or storage rooms in urban environments.
description: A tall, narrow, open-shelved unit with five evenly spaced shelves and a matte gray finish, constructed from solid panels and designed for storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing five open shelves and the full depth of the unit.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid side panel and the unit's narrow profile.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the solid side panel and narrow profile.
